strategies.name: CREATE_EVENT
steps: Optionally tap Location and type location
Optionally tap Description and type description
Tap start date and select target date in date picker, click OK
Tap start/end time and select hours/minutes (use keyboard icon for precise input), click OK
Optionally tap 'No repetition' and pick Daily/Weekly/Monthly/Yearly
Optionally tap reminder and pick preset or Custom
Optionally tap 'Event color' and choose preset or hex code, click OK
Click checkmark in top-right to save
Dismiss Disclaimer dialog with OK if shown
strategies.success_signal: Returned to month/day view and new event label visible on the chosen date
strategies.fallback: If save did not register, reopen event and re-tap checkmark

strategies.name: CREATE_TASK
steps: Click checkmark to save and dismiss Disclaimer
strategies.success_signal: Task entry with checkmark icon appears on the chosen date

strategies.name: EDIT_EVENT_VIA_SEARCH
steps: Tap matching result to open Edit Event screen
strategies.success_signal: Edit screen closes; updated values visible when reopened
strategies.fallback: Reopen event from search results to verify save

strategies.name: DELETE_EVENT
steps: Navigate to date via month grid click
Tap event in day view to open Edit Event
Confirm with Yes in confirmation dialog
strategies.success_signal: Day view no longer lists the deleted event
strategies.fallback: If still listed, repeat with confirm dialog

strategies.name: QUERY_EVENTS_ON_DATE
steps: Read events in the day agenda
Provide count or details via answer action
strategies.fallback: Use search with keyword to cross-check

strategies.name: QUERY_EVENTS_BY_KEYWORD
steps: Scroll through grouped results to count or read
strategies.fallback: Scroll up/down to verify no results were missed

strategies.name: MANAGE_EVENT_TYPE
steps: Click gear icon to open Settings
Click existing type to edit, or + to add new
Type title; tap color circle and select preset/hex code; click OK
strategies.success_signal: Updated type with new name and color appears in list

strategies.name: CHANGE_APP_SETTING
steps: Tap to toggle or open sub-screen
strategies.fallback: Scroll within settings if not visible

strategies.name: NAVIGATE_TO_DISTANT_MONTH
steps: Tap month header to open month/year picker
Tap target year value, then target month value
strategies.success_signal: Header shows target month and year
strategies.fallback: Avoid swiping the picker columns (often dismisses dialog); tap values directly

strategies.name: PRINT_TO_PDF
steps: Open printer selector and choose 'Save as PDF'
Adjust orientation/color/paper size if needed (only active after printer chosen)
Confirm with SAVE in file dialog
strategies.success_signal: Returned to calendar after file save dialog closes
strategies.fallback: If options grayed out, ensure a printer (Save as PDF) is selected first

dead_ends.failed_action: tap gear icon while overflow menu open
dead_ends.note: First tap only dismisses overflow menu; need second tap on gear

dead_ends.failed_action: tap inner circle hour (e.g. 14, 18) on clock face
dead_ends.note: Imprecise taps often select outer-ring counterpart (e.g. 2/6); switch to keypad via keyboard icon
Swipes can be interpreted as outside-dialog taps and dismiss the picker; tap values directly instead

dead_ends.failed_action: expect list to refresh after edit
dead_ends.note: Search results cache; re-open event to verify save or exit search
Options are disabled until a printer (Save as PDF) is chosen
App appears as plain 'Calendar' (orange icon); search via that label or browse

categories.name: ADD_ENTRY
categories.precondition: Application is on its main list/overview screen
abstract_steps: Trigger the create-new affordance (e.g., floating add button)
If a type chooser appears, pick the desired entry kind
Fill required text fields (title at minimum)
Open and set structured pickers (date, time, recurrence, reminder, category/color) as needed
Confirm/save via the primary confirm control
Dismiss any post-save warning/disclaimer dialogs
failure_modes: Tapping outside an open menu dismisses it instead of selecting an option
Forgetting to dismiss a post-save dialog leaves entry uncommitted
Default values (date/time/reminder) not changed to match the requested values
Imprecise taps on circular pickers select neighboring values
verification_checklist: Newly created entry appears in list/overview at the correct slot
All requested attributes match when entry is reopened
No leftover blocking dialog remains on screen

categories.name: EDIT_ENTRY
categories.precondition: Entry exists and is reachable via navigation or search
abstract_steps: Locate the entry (via direct navigation or text search)
Open the entry to enter edit mode
Modify the targeted fields (replace text via select-all + retype when needed)
Adjust structured pickers as required
Confirm/save and dismiss any warning dialogs
failure_modes: Typing into a field without selecting existing text causes concatenation
Stale cached lists do not reflect the change visually until reopened
Save action overlaps with a dialog that must be dismissed first
verification_checklist: Reopening the entry shows the updated values
Overview reflects new attributes (e.g., new color/label/time)

categories.name: DELETE_ENTRY
categories.precondition: Entry exists and can be opened
abstract_steps: Open the entry's detail/edit screen
Activate the delete control
Confirm deletion in the confirmation dialog
failure_modes: Dismissing the confirmation dialog without confirming
Deleting a different occurrence when the entry is recurring
verification_checklist: Entry no longer appears in the relevant view
Search by its identifier returns no result

categories.name: QUERY_INFO
abstract_steps: Navigate to the relevant view (date, settings page, etc.) or use search
Read the displayed information
Aggregate (count/sum/extract) as required
Return the answer via the answer action
failure_modes: Truncated labels in compact views hide full text; need detail/search view
Scrollable lists may have items off-screen; failing to scroll causes undercount
Confusing similar items (e.g., events spanning midnight assigned to wrong day)
verification_checklist: All matching items inspected via scroll/search
Answer matches the requested format (single number, list, etc.)

categories.name: NAVIGATE_TO
categories.precondition: Target screen/date is reachable from current state
abstract_steps: Use header pickers, arrow controls, or search to jump to the target
Prefer direct taps over swipes inside dialog pickers
Confirm the navigation (e.g., OK)
failure_modes: Swipe gestures inside picker dialogs dismiss them
Multiple consecutive month navigations are slow vs. using a year/month picker
verification_checklist: Header or context shows the intended target
Subsequent operations occur in the correct context

categories.name: CONFIGURE_SETTING
abstract_steps: Open settings (gear or equivalent)
Locate the target option, scrolling if needed
Toggle/select the new value
Verify the change persists
failure_modes: Setting hidden behind a parent option (e.g., theme must be 'Custom' to expose color choices)
Tap registers on adjacent option due to dense layout
verification_checklist: Setting visually reflects the new state
Behavior in app changes accordingly when reopened

categories.name: MANAGE_CATEGORY
abstract_steps: Navigate into the category management screen
Add a new category or edit an existing one
Set its name and visual attribute (e.g., color via preset or hex)
Save and verify presence in the list
failure_modes: Closing the dialog without selecting a color leaves default
Saving without filling required name field
verification_checklist: Category appears with correct name and color
Category can be assigned to entries

categories.name: EXPORT_OR_PRINT
abstract_steps: Open the overflow menu and choose Print/Export
Select destination (e.g., Save as PDF)
Adjust output options after destination is set
Trigger save and confirm in file dialog
failure_modes: Output options remain disabled until destination is selected
Multiple rapid taps on save button may re-open creation flows after return
